rejected_candidates.title: Cross-chain liquidation accepts unmapped seize markets and can emit unprocessable packets
rejected_candidates.reason: Not added as a separate issue: overlaps existing revert-only liquidation execution/finalization failures (notably F-023 and F-006) and does not introduce distinct incremental protocol harm beyond those paths.

rejected_candidates.title: Protocol seizure rewards are permanently locked with no withdrawal mechanism
rejected_candidates.reason: Duplicate of existing F-045 (same root cause and impact class).

rejected_candidates.title: Division by zero in distributeBorrowerLend when borrowIndex is zero
rejected_candidates.reason: Premise is generally incorrect for listed initialized markets: `LToken.borrowIndex` is initialized to `1e18` in `LToken.initialize`, so this is not a realistic protocol-level path without separate invalid-market misconfiguration.

rejected_candidates.title: Cross-chain liquidation success handler executes repay with incorrect srcEid mapping
rejected_candidates.reason: Subsumed by existing F-006; the concrete blocker is the impossible collateral lookup parameters/token identity mismatch, which already captures deterministic finalize failure.

rejected_candidates.title: Borrow index comparison inconsistent across chains in collateral authorization
rejected_candidates.reason: Duplicate/overlap with existing F-003 (impossible EID filter excludes debt) and F-025 (wrong index domain for cross-chain accrual).

rejected_candidates.title: Liquidation validation uses seize amount instead of actual repay amount for health check
